details.test: Task 1: Save 3 quick, low-calorie family dinner recipes to Weeknight Dinners collection
Task 2: Create Rainy Day Plan list with indoor free activities for ages 5–8
Task 3: Bookmark a beginner family mindfulness routine article
Task 4: Add cheaper of two highly rated family yoga mats under 60 to Home Gym list
Task 5: Set newsletter preferences for 3 topics with weekly Monday delivery at 08:00
Task 6: Post comment on recent screen-time parenting article for ages 9–12
Task 7: Build Weekend Fun plan with 2 activities and 2 recipes scheduled on correct days
Task 8: Create monthly wellness budget of 200 across 3 categories
